q: What cars do you have available?
a: We carry a range of clean, well-maintained economy and compact vehicles. Message us your dates and we'll confirm exactly what's available.

q: How much does it cost per day?
a: Starting from $65/day — consistently cheaper than the international brands at the airport. Rates vary slightly by vehicle and season.

q: Do you pick up from the airport?
a: Yes — free pickup and dropoff at Lynden Pindling International Airport. Just send us your flight number and arrival time.

q: Can you deliver to my hotel?
a: Yes — we can deliver the vehicle to most Nassau hotels. Message us your hotel name and we'll confirm availability.

q: What documents do I need to rent?
a: A valid driver's licence from your home country and a credit card for the deposit. US and Canadian visitors do not need an international driving permit.

q: Is there a minimum rental period?
a: We rent by the day with no strict minimum. Contact us to check availability for short rentals.

q: Is insurance included?
a: Third-party liability insurance is included in the rental rate. We can advise on additional coverage options at time of booking.

q: Do you require a deposit?
a: Yes — a refundable security deposit is held on your credit card at pickup and released when the vehicle is returned in good condition.

q: What is the cancellation policy?
a: We're flexible. Please let us know as early as possible if your plans change and we'll work with you.

q: Which side of the road do you drive on in Nassau?
a: The LEFT side — same as the UK and Jamaica. It takes a few minutes to adjust but our team will remind you at pickup. Watch especially at roundabouts! 🚗

q: What is the minimum age to rent?
a: Most vehicles require drivers to be 25 or older. Drivers aged 21–24 may rent with a young driver surcharge. Contact us to discuss.

q: Do you have automatic transmission vehicles?
a: Yes — our vehicles are automatic transmission, making it easier to focus on driving on the left.

q: Are there unlimited miles?
a: Yes — our rentals include unlimited mileage across New Providence Island. You cannot take the vehicle to other islands via ferry.

q: Can I take the car to other islands?
a: No — rental cars cannot be taken on ferries to other islands. This is standard across all Nassau rental companies.

q: What fuel policy applies?
a: Our vehicles operate on a full-to-full basis. You receive the car with a full tank and return it full. We'll explain this clearly at pickup.

q: What happens if I have an accident?
a: Contact us immediately. We'll guide you through the process. Third-party liability is included and we carry comprehensive insurance on the fleet.

q: Can I extend my rental?
a: Yes — if you need to extend just message us as early as possible and we'll do our best to accommodate subject to availability.

q: What are your payment methods?
a: We accept major credit cards and bank transfers. Cash may also be accepted — confirm when booking.

q: Do I need to book in advance?
a: Highly recommended, especially December through April (peak season). Same-day bookings are sometimes possible but vehicle selection is limited.

q: Is there 24-hour customer support?
a: You can reach us by WhatsApp at any time during your rental for assistance.

q: What are the traffic rules I should know?
a: Drive on the left, respect roundabout rules, park in the direction of traffic, and no parking within 15 feet of a corner. No toll roads in the Bahamas.

q: Is parking easy to find in Nassau?
a: Generally yes — parking is available at most attractions and shopping areas, though downtown Nassau can be busy. Some lots charge a small fee.

q: Can multiple drivers use the car?
a: Yes — additional drivers can be added to the rental agreement. All drivers must have a valid licence and meet age requirements.

q: Do you recommend any places to visit?
a: Absolutely! We love helping visitors discover Nassau. From the fish fry to Cable Beach, Blue Lagoon Island to the Queen's Staircase — ask us and we'll give you a local's guide.

q: Is there Uber in Nassau?
a: No — Uber and Lyft do not operate in Nassau. Taxis are available but a rental car gives you the most flexibility and is often more cost-effective for multi-day stays.

q: What condition are your vehicles in?
a: Clean, well-maintained, and fully insured. We take pride in our fleet and ensure every vehicle is inspection-ready before every rental.

q: Do you have child car seats?
a: Contact us in advance if you need a child car seat and we'll do our best to accommodate your request.

q: What if the car breaks down?
a: Call or WhatsApp us immediately. We'll arrange assistance or a replacement vehicle as quickly as possible.

q: Are your prices all-inclusive?
a: Our daily rate includes third-party insurance and unlimited mileage. The deposit is refundable. We're transparent — no hidden fees.

q: Can I rent a car if I'm visiting on a cruise?
a: Yes! Day rentals for cruise visitors are popular. Just let us know your ship's arrival and departure times so we can plan around your port day.

q: Do you offer airport meet and greet?
a: Yes — we can meet you at arrivals with your vehicle ready. Just share your flight details and we'll coordinate the timing.

q: What is the fuel cost in Nassau?
a: Fuel prices in Nassau are higher than in the US — budget approximately $6–7 per gallon. Our economy vehicles are fuel-efficient to keep your costs down.

q: Can I return the car after hours?
a: After-hours returns can sometimes be arranged. Please discuss this with us at pickup and we'll make a plan.

q: Are there any road tolls?
a: No — there are no toll roads or toll bridges in the Bahamas.

q: Why choose a local rental company over the big brands?
a: Better prices, personal service, WhatsApp support throughout your stay, and local knowledge you won't get from an international desk. We treat every customer like a VIP.

q: How do I make a reservation?
a: Just message us here on WhatsApp with your dates, pickup location, and vehicle preference. We'll confirm availability and send booking details.

q: Do you have SUVs or larger vehicles?
a: Primarily economy and compact vehicles. Contact us for current availability if you need a larger vehicle.

q: Can I pick up at the airport and drop off at my hotel?
a: Yes — one-way arrangements can be accommodated. Just let us know your pickup and dropoff locations when booking.

q: Is there a GPS in the car?
a: We recommend using Google Maps on your phone — it works excellently in Nassau. We're happy to help you set it up offline if needed.
